Part-time Inventory Assistant
Cedar Home Goods is looking for a part-time inventory assistant for its downtown store. Duties include counting returned items, updating shelf labels, and preparing transfer boxes for the warehouse. Applicants must be available on Tuesday and Friday mornings. Experience with inventory software is preferred but not required.

Manager's Message
Maya,

Please share the posting with the community college career office. The warehouse team needs transfer boxes ready before noon on Fridays, so availability on Friday mornings is the most important requirement. We can train the new assistant on our inventory software during the first week. If we receive applications by May 12, I would like to schedule interviews on May 15.
